w:r.w:t: Prepared by: CFO • CEO • CTO • Marketing Lead • Finance Lead

Starto is an early-stage startup platform connecting founders with talent through signals, offers, and connections. This document defines the unified subscription model across all user types — Talent, Founders, and Captains — with associated pricing, feature gates, infrastructure cost analysis, and a realistic revenue roadmap.

The immediate strategic priority is the Starto Captains program — 30 paying captains at ₹99/month fully covers all infrastructure costs, achieving cash-flow positive status without requiring a large user base.
The following table outlines all active services and their estimated monthly costs at different user scales. All costs are in Indian Rupees (INR).

Key insight: At zero users, your burn is a mere ₹1,100/month. This is exceptionally low for a platform with this tech stack. Razorpay charges 2% per transaction with no monthly fee — on a ₹149 transaction, you net ₹146.02. Negligible at early stage.

All plans serve all user types — Talent, Founders, and Captains are not separated. The platform uses a single subscription model where features unlock based on plan tier. Captain plans are a distinct vertical with a community-first value proposition.
★ Pro (₹149/month) is the anchor plan — all other plans are priced relative to it. Short plans (Trial, Sprint) are acquisition tools, not revenue plays.

The Captain program is a unique subscription vertical targeting students, early-career professionals, and aspiring entrepreneurs. It provides real startup experience in exchange for a minimal monthly commitment. This is your fastest path to cash-flow positive.

Strategic note: The Captain plan costs you zero extra infra. It delivers high-perceived-value benefits (experience, recognition, community) that cost only your time. Target college campuses, LinkedIn, and startup communities. 30 Captains = ₹2,970/month = infra fully covered.
The following projections are grounded in reality — starting from zero active users and modeling conservative conversion rates. Razorpay's 2% transaction fee is factored into net figures.
Low-friction entry. Acquisition tool, not revenue driver. Converts skeptics into paying users.
User pays ₹29 → psychologically invested → upgrades to Pro at ₹149 on next cycle.
Bridges the gap between weekly and monthly. Targets impulse buyers and job-hunting sprints.
Users in active job search buy Boost, experience value, then move to Pro Plus.
The anchor. All pricing decisions revolve around this plan. Presented as 'most popular'.
Core recurring revenue plan. KPI: minimize churn from this tier.
Long-term retention. Shown only after first payment to build trust before big commitment.
Do NOT prominently feature Annual (₹999) until you have 50+ paid users and reviews.
Community-first. Unique value prop that Pro cannot replace. Targets students & career-starters.
Your fastest path to cash-flow positive. 30 Captains = infra covered.
Gate features that have high perceived value but low infra cost. Never gate features that drive discovery and sign-ups.
Zero cost to deliver, massive perceived value. Best gate on platform.
Let free users feel the product (3/day), hit the wall naturally, then upgrade.
2 free signals is enough to test. Founders wanting more should pay.
Discovery feature — drives sign-ups. Never gate initial discovery.
Power users care about this. Good Pro+ differentiator.
Exclusive community. The gate IS the value.
Push Captain program to college communities, LinkedIn, startup WhatsApp groups. Run a 'Founding Captains' campaign — first 30 get a special founding badge.
Grow free user base to 300+ with zero-friction sign-up. Use Firebase notifications to nudge Trial (₹29) plan. A/B test landing page copy.
300+ registered users. 15+ Trial plan conversions. First Pro upgrades.
Activate Pro (₹149) push. Introduce push notifications for expiry. Show Pro+ and Growth plans only to users who have paid at least once.
50+ Pro subscribers. First Pro Plus conversions. MRR > ₹10,000.
6.1 What NOT to Do (Early Stage Warnings)
✗ Showing Annual (₹999) plan to new users with no social proof
✓ Surface Annual only after user has paid at least once
✗ Trying to monetize your 50 inactive users right now
✓ Focus on acquiring 30 Captains first — quality over quantity
✓ Keep discovery features free — they drive sign-ups
✗ Building complex subscription analytics before you have 100 subscribers
✓ Use Razorpay's built-in dashboard. Custom analytics later.
✗ Pricing lower to get users (race to the bottom)
✓ ₹149/month is already very affordable. Hold the price.
1. Captains first — 30 Captains at ₹99 = ₹2,970/month = cash-flow positive. This is your 30-day mission.
2. Your burn is only ₹1,100/month — don't panic, but don't be complacent. Use this runway wisely.
3. Trial (₹29) and Sprint (₹59) are conversion tools, not revenue. Never remove them.
4. Pro (₹149) is your anchor — every design and marketing decision should funnel users here.
5. Don't show Annual (₹999) prominently until you have 50+ paid users and at least 10 public reviews.
6. WhatsApp unlock is your single best feature gate — zero cost to you, high value to users.
7. Keep geospatial (Nearby) always free — it's a discovery feature that drives organic sign-ups.
8. Rate-limit AI analysis on free tier (don't block it) — let users feel the value, then upgrade.
STARTO — Build fast. Price smart. Grow real.
